title: Liquid
body:
Liquid takes the standard collection of performance mods that players typically gather and pre-packages them into one convenient modpack, without the need of searching and downloading random mods while at it.
<details><summary>
FPS Summary
</summary>

**This test was done on Liquid v1**

Specifications: 

- Nvidia RTX 3050 Laptop GPU

- 11th Gen Intel i7-11800H

- Windows 11 Home


Results:

> 671 FPS whilst standing still

> 488 FPS when flying around

> 1213 FPS when looking up into the sky

***Your FPS will depend on your specific hardware and system configuration.***  

</details>
